title: CUBE Registry Entry
description: Schema for a CUBE-compliant benchmark registry entry. Author-provided fields only — CI-derived fields (status, resources, task_count, etc.) must not be present in PRs.

id.description: Globally unique slug. Must match the filename (entries/<id>.yaml). Lowercase, hyphens allowed, no spaces.

version.description: PyPI package version. Must match the published version exactly.

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what the benchmark tests.

package.description: PyPI package name for pip install. Must follow PyPI normalised naming rules.

dev_install_url.description: Optional git+https URL for pip install before the package is published to PyPI. Only github.com and gitlab.com are allowed as hosts. Example: git+https://github.com/org/repo#subdirectory=cubes/my-cube

authors.description: List of cube developers submitting this entry. At least one required. Populates OWNERS.yaml on merge.

wrapper_license.description: SPDX identifier for the cube wrapper code. The cube developer owns this.

benchmark_license.description: License information for the underlying benchmark (unverified — self-reported).

reported.description: SPDX identifier as understood by the cube developer. Labelled 'reported' in UI.

source_url.description: URL to the benchmark's official license page.

verified_by_original_authors.description: CI-derived: set to true only when submitter matches known-authors.yaml. Do not set manually.

notices.description: Structured legal notices for risks beyond the license field.

paper.description: arXiv or venue URL for the benchmark paper.

tags.description: Searchable tags. Use standard values where possible.

getting_started_url.description: Link to documentation or quick-start guide.

supported_infra.description: For VM-based cubes only: cloud providers where the slow check is configured to run. Omit for cubes that run locally or in Docker (no cloud infra needed). Only set this once you have verified the cube works on the given provider.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Guideline for maximum number of parallel tasks. Default: 1.

status.description: CI-managed status. Authors may submit 'archived' to retire an entry; CI sets 'active' or 'degraded'.

resources.description: CI-derived: JSON-serialized ResourceConfig objects from benchmark.resources. CI overwrites on every check.

task_count.description: CI-derived: number of tasks returned by benchmark.tasks().

has_debug_task.description: CI-derived: true if benchmark declares at least one debug task.

has_debug_agent.description: CI-derived: true if Benchmark class has make_debug_agent() method.

action_space.description: CI-derived: tool names and schemas from tools/list on a reset task.

features.description: CI-derived: feature flags detected by introspecting the benchmark/task classes.

async.description: True if benchmark overrides async_step() or async_reset().

multi_agent.description: True if task class is a MultiAgentTask subclass.

multi_dim_reward.description: True if evaluation response includes reward_breakdown.

stress_results_url.description: CI-derived: path to the latest stress-results JSON. Set by slow check.
